form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last of 10 at Newmarket (Rowley) in the G3 Cornwallis Stakes October 10 over 1000m, 8 len behind Beckford's Folly with 58.5kg at $23. On debut second of 7 at Nottingham June 1 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Ameeq with 59kg at $21. A big run will not surprise.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation third of 13 at York in the LR Rockingham Stakes October 11 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Division carrying 58.5kg at $19. On debut won by neck Salisbury May 15 over 1000m defeating Charlie Boyo carrying 60.5kg at $9.50. Winning hope.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second of 12 at Dundalk All Weather in the LR October 10 over 1005m, 1.0 len behind Ipanema Queen with 59.5kg at $7.50. On debut fourth of 18 at Newbury May 16 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Humidity with 60.5kg at $19. Shows promise and worth following up.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 44-day let-up. First-up after six months in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather on February 25 over 1600m, 3 len behind Hidden Force carrying 60.5kg at $17. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at York on May 15 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind First Legion with 59kg at $4. Fitter and is a leading contender.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 3rd of 14 at Newcastle All Weather on April 3 over 1200m, 4 len behind Al Najashi with 61kg at $7. Before that 3rd of 8 at Lingfield All Weather in the LR Spring Cup on February 28 over 1400m, 1.3 len behind Hilitany carrying 59kg at $8. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Newmarket (Rowley) in the G1 Cheveley Park Stakes September 27 over 1200m, 7 len behind True Love carrying 58kg at $29. On debut won by 2.5 len Bath April 4 2025 over 1000m defeating Canyouhearthedrums with 57kg at $19. Don't underestimate.
